title: Pluto Packaging Winchester Trough 60cm Bell Pot Black Or Terracotta Rectangular Indoor Outdoor Planter For Flowers & Plants (1, Terracotta)
features: Size/ Dimensions: 60cm Bell Pot Trough Dimensions (Approx): 600 x 210 x 160mm / 60 x 21 x 16cm.

Available in black and terracotta this plant pot is designed to allow you to showcase your flowers and plants in a stylish way. Each plant pot is extremely spacious allowing your plant to have plenty of space to grow.

The plant pots have a lightweight design which allows you to move them around with ease. Suitable to use both indoors and outdoors these multipurpose plant pots which will sit perfectly in any outdoor environment.
Made from durable plastic the planters are weather resistant and designed to withstand all kinds of weathers.
description: The bell pot trough Winchester plant pot is a lightweight planter designed to showcase your flowers and plants. Its lightweight design allows you to carry the planter around with ease, available in black and terracotta this planter can be used indoors and outdoors.
